query:
-- Alter homeownerProfiles to add new columns (skip if already exist)
ALTER TABLE homeownerProfiles
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS displayName VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phone VARCHAR(30),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contactPreference ENUM('email','text','phone','in_app') DEFAULT 'email',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS openToRecommendations BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS consentTerms BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS consentPhotos BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS consentPartnerContact BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS consentAiData BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;

-- Properties table (multi-property per homeowner)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS properties (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ownerId INT NOT NULL,
  nickname VARCHAR(100),
  address VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  city VARCHAR(100),
  state VARCHAR(50),
  zip VARCHAR(20),
  latitude DECIMAL(10,7),
  longitude DECIMAL(10,7),
  propertyType ENUM('single_family','condo','townhouse','multi_family','other') DEFAULT 'single_family',
  yearBuilt INT,
  sqft INT,
  bedrooms INT,
  bathrooms DECIMAL(3,1),
  lotSize ENUM('under_0_25','0_25_to_0_5','0_5_to_1','over_1'),
  hasPool BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  hasGarage BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  garageType ENUM('attached','detached','none') DEFAULT 'none',
  hasFence BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  isPrimary BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  isRental BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  occupancy ENUM('owner_occupied','tenant_occupied','vacant') DEFAULT 'owner_occupied',
  ownershipYears ENUM('under_1','1_to_3','3_to_7','7_to_15','over_15'),
  hiringPriorities JSON,
  setupStep INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  setupComplete BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (ownerId) REFERENCES homeownerProfiles(id)
);

-- Property Improvements table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS propertyImprovements (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT NOT NULL,
  category VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  completedYear INT,
  hasWarranty BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (propertyId) REFERENCES properties(id)
);

-- Property Wishes table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS propertyWishes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT NOT NULL,
  category VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  budgetRange ENUM('under_1k','1k_5k','5k_15k','15k_50k','over_50k','not_sure'),
  urgency ENUM('within_30_days','1_to_3_months','3_to_6_months','6_to_12_months','just_researching'),
  preferredTimeline VARCHAR(100),
  notes TEXT,
  leadCreated BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  leadCreatedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (propertyId) REFERENCES properties(id)
);

-- Property Photos table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS propertyPhotos (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  propertyId INT NOT NULL,
  uploadedByUserId INT,
  s3Key VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  url TEXT NOT NULL,
  thumbnailUrl TEXT,
  roomLabel VARCHAR(100),
  caption TEXT,
  aiScanned BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  aiSignals JSON,
  aiScannedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  hasPetSignal BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (propertyId) REFERENCES properties(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (uploadedByUserId) REFERENCES users(id)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user e6qeZQ9RRN5ZtzL.187ccab2ac56 --database dAVBxpSeSZ4jhwmMBJquFo --execute

  FOREIGN KEY (uploadedByUserId) REFERENCES users(id)
